studies.title: Evaluation of the impact of the Una Health for Diabetes app on HbA1c in patients with type 2 diabetes (EVALUNA)

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the 'Una Health for Diabetes' app, as indicated by the title and detailed descriptions in the trial registration. The app is the primary intervention being tested for its impact on HbA1c in patients with type 2 diabetes.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RCT indicators vs 0 RWE indicators.
